title: Hello, World!
description:
Write a C++ program that prints exactly:

Hello, World!

Make sure the output matches exactly, including capitalization and punctuation.
constraints:
• No input required
• Output must match exactly

title: Sum of Two Numbers
description:
Read two integers from input and print their sum.

Example:
Input: 3 7
Output: 10
constraints:
• Two integers on one line separated by space
• -1000 ≤ a, b ≤ 1000

title: Even or Odd
description: Given an integer N, print "Even" if it is even, or "Odd" if it is odd.

title: Count to N
description: Given a positive integer N, print all numbers from 1 to N, each on a separate line.

title: Factorial
description:
Compute the factorial of a given non-negative integer N.

Factorial of N (written N!) = 1 × 2 × 3 × ... × N
Factorial of 0 = 1
